Dua Lipa can get it.

It’s interesting to see me grow frustrated the first three days and keep eating more and then Sunday and today have my appetite kinda be nonexistent? I’m almost positive I was eating like 4,000 to 6,000 calories a day before this. So to only have 1,400 and feel fine? Cool. https://t.co/mCw02JuAfM
